selection_scope: Questions explicitly about tumor-immune biology, immunotherapy response, or the tumor microenvironment.
domain_specific_assumptions: Separate tumor-intrinsic, TME-intrinsic, immune-cell-intrinsic, product-level, and bulk-proxy evidence.
Do not convert marker or signature association into a cellular mechanism without scope-matched evidence.
Require donor/sample-aware inference for cross-patient single-cell claims.
experiment_design_axes: tumor, immune, stromal, and bulk-proxy separation
sample or donor as biological unit
